NHC = NTC - NBC (household credit = total credit minus business credit)
NHNFA = nhnfa_cd + nhnfa_dw (household non-financial assets = consumer durables + dwellings)
PC = NC / RC * 100 (consumption deflator)
PG = (ngi + ngc) / (gi + gc) * 100 (public-demand deflator)
PXAG = NXAG / XAG * 100 (agricultural export deflator)
PIB = NIB / IB * 100 (private business investment deflator)
PM = NM / M * 100 (import deflator)
PGNE = NGNE / GNE * 100 (gross national expenditure deflator)
PDFD = NDFD / DFD * 100 (domestic final demand deflator)
PX = NX / X * 100 (export deflator)
PY = NY / Y * 100 (GDP deflator)
TOT = PX / PM * 100 (terms of trade)
PID = NID / id * 100 (dwelling investment deflator)
POTC = NOTC / otc * 100 (ownership transfer cost deflator)
HCOE = NHCOE / PC (real compensation of employees)
ATS = IB - IBtot (second-hand asset sales = new minus total private business investment)
NATS = NIB - NIBtot (nominal second-hand asset sales)
Stocks level via PIM: KV[1980Q1] = 134865 then KV[t] = KV[t-1] + V[t]
NHA = NHFA + NHNFA (total household assets)
NHNW = NHA - NHL (household net wealth)
NHOY = nhdy - NHCOE (household non-labour income)
IBN = IB - IBRE (non-mining business investment)
XRE = sum of resource export sub-categories from ABS 5302 (XRE_ores + XRE_coal + XRE_othm + XRE_metl + XRE_nonm)
XM = sum of manufactured export sub-categories from ABS 5302 (XM_MACH + XM_TRNS + XM_OTHR + XM_BEVO)
XO = sum of other export sub-categories minus XM_BEVO (avoiding double-count)
XAGEXRAIN = XAG - RAIN (agricultural exports excluding rain-affected output)
PIBN = NIBN / IBN * 100 (non-mining business investment deflator); NIBN = NIB - NIBRE
PIBRE = NIBRE / IBRE * 100 (mining investment deflator)
PXM = NXM / XM * 100 (manufactured export deflator)
PXO = NXO / XO * 100 (other export deflator)
PXRE = NXRE / XRE * 100 (resource export deflator)
PXS = NXS / XS * 100 (services export deflator)
PAE = NHCOE / (LHPP * LE) (average earnings per hour from national accounts)
LUR = 100 * (1 - LE / LF) (unemployment rate); falls back to UR_hist when missing
NBRSP = NBR - NCR (business rate spread to cash rate)
NSP = NMR - NCR (mortgage rate spread to cash rate)

HOY = NHOY / PC (real household other income)
HNW = NHNW / PC (real household net wealth)
G = GI + GC (public demand, real)
NG = NGI + NGC (public demand, nominal)
DPFD = RC + ID + IB + OTC - ATS (private domestic final demand)
NDPFD = NC + NID + NIB + NOTC - NATS (nominal private DFD)
DFDX = DFD + X (domestic final demand including exports)
RPH = PH / PTM (real house price index)
NULC = NHCOE / Y (nominal unit labour cost)
RLC = PAE / PGNE (real labour cost)
RULC = NULC / PGNE (real unit labour cost)
RULCY = NULC / PY (real unit labour cost, GDP-deflated)
LURGAP = LUR - TLUR (unemployment gap above NAIRU)
